title: Nether recipes
description: This mod adds recipes in to the game from blocks/items in the nether so you can craft them in the overworld.
body:
This modification significantly expands the crafting possibilities within the game, introducing a plethora of new recipes that bridge the gap between the Nether and the Overworld. By integrating additional crafting recipes, players gain the ability to craft blocks and items typically exclusive to the Nether directly within the Overworld environment, fostering greater creativity and resource utilization.

Furthermore, this mod introduces an array of new items that serve as essential components in various crafting recipes. These newly added items not only enrich the gameplay experience but also provide players with the means to craft a diverse range of creations, unlocking new avenues for exploration and innovation.

With this mod, players can delve deeper into the intricacies of crafting, utilizing the expanded recipe list to craft specialized items and materials. Whether it's forging powerful weapons, constructing elaborate structures, or embarking on ambitious projects, the possibilities are boundless with the addition of these new crafting options.

I recommend Just enough items JEI and extra recipes for this mod because u can see the recipes with jei and u can use the other recipes with extra recipes.

here are some examples:

soul soil recipe 
is sand paper and soul sand

sand paper recipe 
is sand an paper

netherrack recipe
X4 stone, red dye and sand paper.

all rights reserved u can use this mod. In videos pictures and other stuff but dont say the mod is yours and dont say u made the mod.
I would appreciate it if u shout out the mod it is not required
